product: Inbound Private Link for performance-intensive services is now generally availab
tagline: June 8, 2026 Inbound Private Link for performance intensive services, such as Lakebase Autoscaling and Zerobus Ingest, is now generally available.
what_it_does: June 8, 2026 Inbound Private Link for performance intensive services, such as Lakebase Autoscaling and Zerobus Ingest, is now generally available. See [Configure inbound PrivateLink for performance intensive services](/aws/en/security/network/front end/service direct privatelink).
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
